chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 973 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of pre-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of pre-arrest bail 23.12.2025 Mr. Mahboob Ahmad Soomro, Advocate for applicants. Mr. Abdul Mujeeb Shaikh, Advocate for complainant. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Applicants are present on interim pre-arrest bail. Learned Counsel for the applicants, after arguing the matter to some length, requires the bail application to be disposed of with the direction that the learned trial Court may attempt for conclusion of the trial within a reasonable period. Learned Counsel for the complainant as well as learned DPG extends no objections. Accordingly, learned trial Court is directed to conclude the trial within a period of one month. Interim order dated 08.10.2025 stands recalled. Matter stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
